nasb.text: They began to discuss this among themselves, saying, “He said that because we did not bring any bread.”

esv.text: And they began discussing it among themselves, saying, “We brought no bread.”

cnv.text: 他們就彼此議論說：“這是因為我們沒有帶餅吧。”

ccb.text: 门徒彼此议论说：“这是因为我们没有带饼吧。”

csbs.text: 门徒们就彼此讨论说：“这是因为我们没有带饼吧。”
